sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'lo' does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence; it is a minor grammatical addition.
'Avisaras' (you will notify) and 'instalaras' (you will install) have completely different meanings and change the intent of the sentence.
'Manera' (way/manner) and 'transporto' (I transport/transport) are unrelated and this substitution makes the sentence incoherent.
